div.head: The Chargé in Poland (Cable) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 84. Referring to the Department’s circular instruction December 1, 4 p.m. Had interview with Minister of Foreign Affairs today who was noncommittal except to state that his Government would consider what action should be taken. He informed me that he was in receipt of a note from the French Embassy, the purport of which was similar to the Department’s telegram. In view of Polish attitude, I stressed the communication to the Free City of Danzig of the stand taken by the United States.
